title: Minecraft Ten Font
description: This resourcepack changes Symbols, Latin and Cyrillic characters to look something like Minecraft Ten font
body:
# About I was heavily inspired by looks of ORE UI (Bedrock Edition) I had in my memory and [GabrielDja's GUI SimpleStylized](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-simplestylized) so i made this resourcepack to make Minecraft's GUI look fancier.

Q: 1.18 or lower?
A: You can use 1.19 version and ignore the warning, but support is not guaranteed.

Q: How to contact you?
A: @xllifi on Discord.

Q: What about actually maintaining the resourcepack?
A: Open an issue on GitHub, I'll respond and update / expand the resourcepack in my free time.


[![Best experience with GUI SimpleStylized](https://i.imgur.com/NYZtkwl.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-simplestylized) ## Missing characters/symbols If you found some characters missing, please [file an Issue on GitHub](https://github.com/xlifi/MinecraftTen/issues/new/choose) ## Contributing Feel free to [Fork the GitHub repository](https://github.com/xlifi/MinecraftTen/fork) and [create Pull Requests](https://github.com/xlifi/MinecraftTen/compare) ### License This project uses CC-BY 4.0
[![CC-BY 4.0](https://i.imgur.com/XBu1mBH.png)](https://github.com/xlifi/MinecraftTen/blob/1.20/LICENSE.md)
You are free to use this font wherever you want as long as you credit me or link to this page.
